scope: audit-only synthesis of existing evidence; no broad kernel search, no live benchmark, no default change

primitive_boundary.tile: owned_flash_tile_gqa_whole (whole_cache=True; shipped tk16/v1/u1; grid (Hkv,S,1)=(8,48,1) block (128,1,1) = 384 wg)

primitive_boundary.rule: combine + cache-ABI are part of the primitive; tile A/B alone is not W==D-ready (split_kv_economics_contract_v1)

answers.Q4_underoccupied: YES (32 wg on 96 CUs; occupancy proxy 0.33 wg/CU vs tile 4.0)
answers.Q5_fixed_latency_floor: YES (flat in ctx; scales only with S; latency/occupancy-bound ~64 GB/s = 6.7% of HBM peak)
answers.Q6_E_49152: default route NO (E_49152_present=false, buffer_identity_inputs=true); only DECODE_ATTN_KV_IDENTITY=0 fallback reintroduces it; aggressive probe keeps KV_IDENTITY=1
answers.Q7_aggressive_attribution: NO realized improvement (lane FAILS target ~0.7-1.5%/ctx, do_not_promote). Same owned route; only differing knob Q4K_GEMV_WARP_PROJ=1 (weight-GEMV projection, NOT tile/combine). Effectively noise on the shipped route; +13-19% A-beats-B is from DECODE_ATTN_KV_IDENTITY (buffer-identity vs slice), not GEMV-proj/combine.
answers.Q8_single_lifecycle_or_cheaper_combine: cheaper combine BUILT (B5-lite 2.4x) and W==D-REFUTED (saturates +5.7%, overlaps in-graph); fused single-lifecycle merge is codegen-walled (UOp store-group multi-granularity reduce, Q8L-2 precedent) AND projected sub-gate
answers.Q9_amdahl_vs_gate: only the free-combine ESTIMATE (+8.58% @ctx4096) cleared the +7% gate; half (+6.97%) misses; estimate REFUTED by B5 +5.7% measurement. Route shipped via tile-default + buffer-identity (+13-19% vs slice), a different lever. No remaining combine-Amdahl path clears the gate.
answers.Q10_exhaustion_evidence: (1) B5_COMBINE_LOCAL_PASS_WD_FAIL (2.4x cheaper -> +5.7% saturation); (2) aggressive UNPROVEN__THROUGHPUT do_not_promote; (3) ctx-slope DECODE_CTX_SLOPE_NO_ACTION_UNDER_8B_MAXC do_not=[broad_decode_search,default_change,kernel_change]; (4) DECODE_ATTN_AMDGCN_TILE=0 delta +0.00; (5) campaign synthesis attention exhausted, decode HBM-bound at parity+ (100.6-104% of llama); unknown-bucket lockstep PROVEN pre+post
